case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL VS ANDERSON CRENSHAW INDDBA 559 WALLER ST APTS et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $353.12 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION, INVESTIGATION DIVISION ROOM 220 AS TO DEFENDANT ANDERSON CRENSHAW INDDBA 559 WALLER ST APTS ANDERSON ANNIE INDDBA 559 WALLER ST APTS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-15-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 00
